exercises.code:
def blocking_key(rec):
    surname = str(rec.get('surname', '')).casefold().strip()
    city = str(rec.get('city', '')).casefold().strip()
    return f'{surname}|{city}'

print(blocking_key({'surname': 'Huamán', 'city': 'Cusco'}))

exercises.code:
pairs = [
    {"id": "P1", "score": 0.2},
    {"id": "P2", "score": 0.55},
    {"id": "P3", "score": 0.7},
    {"id": "P4", "score": 0.9},
]

def clerical_queue(pairs, low=0.4, high=0.8):
    return [p['id'] for p in pairs if low <= p['score'] < high]

print(clerical_queue(pairs))

exercises.code:
def shared_email(a, b):
    ea = (a.get('email') or '').casefold().strip()
    eb = (b.get('email') or '').casefold().strip()
    return bool(ea) and ea == eb

print(shared_email({'email': 'a@x.pe'}, {'email': 'A@x.pe'}))
print(shared_email({'email': 'a@x.pe'}, {'email': 'b@x.pe'}))
print(shared_email({'email': ''}, {'email': ''}))

exercises.code:
def explanation_bullets(er, rel, missing):
    return [
        f'entity_resolution_score={er}',
        f'relationship_signal_score={rel}',
        f'missing={missing}',
    ]

print(explanation_bullets(0.9, 0.2, ['phone']))

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: entity_resolution_score y relationship_signal_score deben mantenerse separados en la ficha de caso.
Un false positive de ER es error de matching; no es veredicto legal de fraude.
En zona gris de score el sistema encola needs_review o se abstiene según política.
CF-1 en S13 incluye privacy sheet, acceso, tests, demo y runbook.
Level-1 regression notes exigen re-chequear paths críticos S01–S13 en el runbook.

confusion_points: S13: matriz ops_status exige invalid_input fuera de [0,1].
